effects.label: Charge
effects.value: Move up to 2 Spaces before making a Melee Martial Attack on your turn.

effects.label: Mighty Leap
effects.value: might

effects.label: Stamina Regeneration
effects.value: Once per round, regain up to half maximum SP when you score or take a Heavy/Critical Hit.

effects.label: Might Advantage
effects.value: ADV on Might Saves while Raging.

effects.label: Damage Resistance
effects.value: Resistance (Half) to Elemental and Physical damage while Raging.

effects.label: Shattering Force
effects.value: Melee Attacks against structures and mundane objects are Critical Hits.

effects.label: Fortitude Shout
effects.value: Grant allies Resistance (1) against next Physical or Elemental damage.

effects.label: Fury Shout
effects.value: Grant allies +1 damage on their next Attack.

effects.label: Urgent Shout
effects.value: Grant allies +1 Speed until start of your next turn.

effects.label: Rage
effects.value: Reaction on Initiative: enter Rage for free.

effects.label: Berserker
effects.value: Charge grants 3 Spaces of movement and ignores Difficult Terrain.

effects.label: Battlecry
effects.value: Battlecry range 10 Spaces; Fortitude Shout can grant Resistance Half for 1 SP, Fury Shout can add +1 damage for 3 SP, and Urgent Shout can add +2 Speed per SP up to 2 SP.

effects.label: Elemental Affinity
effects.value: Voice can boom 3x louder, create elemental visual displays, Resistance to environmental Exhaustion.

selections.prompt: Choose your Elemental Rage damage type.
Choose 1 additional benefit for your Aura Type.

effects.label: Erupting Elements
effects.value: While Raging, creatures in your Aura that damage you immediately take 1 Elemental Rage damage.

effects.label: Elemental Blast
effects.value: Spend 1 AP and 1 SP to make an Area Spell Attack against chosen creatures in your Aura. Hit: 1 Elemental Rage damage. Single target attacks the target's PD and deals 2 damage.

effects.label: Choose your Elemental Rage damage type.: Cold
effects.value: Elemental Rage damage is Cold. Gain 2 Space Aura while Raging with elemental effects.

effects.label: Choose your Elemental Rage damage type.: Fire
effects.value: Elemental Rage damage is Fire. Gain 2 Space Aura while Raging with elemental effects.

effects.label: Choose your Elemental Rage damage type.: Lightning
effects.value: Elemental Rage damage is Lightning. Gain 2 Space Aura while Raging with elemental effects.

effects.label: Choose your Elemental Rage damage type.: Physical
effects.value: Elemental Rage damage is Physical (choose Bludgeoning/Piercing/Slashing each Rage). Gain 2 Space Aura while Raging with elemental effects.

effects.label: Choose 1 additional benefit for your Aura Type.: Slowing Aura
effects.value: Aura creates Difficult Terrain for chosen creatures. Failed saves also cause Slowed until end of their next turn.

effects.label: Choose 1 additional benefit for your Aura Type.: Splashing Aura
effects.value: Once per turn, Elemental Rage damage splashes to a creature within 1 Space for 1 damage.

effects.label: Choose 1 additional benefit for your Aura Type.: Stunning Aura
effects.value: Once per turn, creatures that fail saves in your Aura cannot spend AP on Reactions until start of their next turn.

effects.label: Choose 1 additional benefit for your Aura Type.: Pushing Aura
effects.value: Elemental Blast forces Physical Save; failure moves targets 2 Spaces toward or away from you.

selections.prompt: Learn 1 of the following Maneuvers (or any Maneuver if you know all 3).

effects.label: Spiritual Aura
effects.value: While Raging: 5 Space Aura allows Shove on any creature (pushed in your chosen direction), use Brace/Parry/Protect on any creature in Aura.

effects.label: Learn 1 of the following Maneuvers (or any Maneuver if you know all 3).: Brace
Learn 1 of the following Maneuvers (or any Maneuver if you know all 3).: Parry
Learn 1 of the following Maneuvers (or any Maneuver if you know all 3).: Protect
Ancestral Knowledge
effects.value: ADV on Checks about your Ancestries' history. Once per Long Rest: ADV on a Trade or Language Check as a spirit lends you its experience.

effects.label: Crowd Pleaser
effects.value: ADV on Charisma Checks against targets who watched your performance for 1 hour.

effects.label: Ranged Help Attack
effects.value: Help Action range for attacks extends to 10 Spaces.

effects.label: Help Reaction
effects.value: Take Help Action as Reaction when creatures make Checks.

effects.label: Choose a performance type: Battle Ballad
effects.value: Allies in aura gain d4 bonus to first Attack Check each turn.

effects.label: Choose a performance type: Fast Tempo
effects.value: Allies in aura gain +1 Speed.

effects.label: Choose a performance type: Inspiring
effects.value: Allies in aura gain 1 Temp HP at start of their turns.

effects.label: Choose a performance type: Emotional
effects.value: Allies in aura gain Resistance to chosen condition and can repeat saves at start of turn.

effects.label: Font of Inspiration
effects.value: Your Help Die starts at d10.

effects.label: Bardic Performance
effects.value: Free performance change at start of turn. Spend 2 MP when starting: Battle Ballad die becomes d8, Fast Tempo grants +2 Speed, Inspiring Performance grants +1 temp HP, or Emotional Performance grants resistance to its listed Conditions.

effects.label: Enthrall
effects.value: Charm spell doesn't end from target taking damage.

effects.label: Misleading Muse
effects.value: Spend 1 AP as Reaction to charm attacker and redirect attack.

effects.label: Mind Games
effects.value: Deal 1 Psychic damage when charm ends.

effects.label: Eloquent Orator
effects.value: All creatures with language can understand your speech.

effects.label: Heckle
effects.value: Taunt creatures who fail saves in your performance aura.

effects.label: Distraction
effects.value: Spend 1 AP as Reaction to subtract Help Die from attacker's Check within 10 Spaces.

effects.label: Pratfall
effects.value: Grant ally ADV on Check when you fail a save.

effects.label: Comedian
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Combat Readiness
effects.value: First turn in Combat: choose Fortify (Dodge + ADV on next Save) or Advance (Move + ADV on next Martial Attack or Physical Check).

effects.label: Second Wind
effects.value: Once per Combat when Bloodied at turn start: regain 2 HP and 2 SP.

effects.label: Know Your Enemy
effects.value: Spend 1 minute (or 1 AP in Combat) to assess creature's Might, Agility, PD, AD, or HP vs. yours (DC 10 Knowledge/Insight).

effects.label: Martial Path
effects.value: Once per round, regain up to half maximum SP when you perform a Maneuver.

effects.label: Weapon Master
effects.value: Free weapon swapping at start of turn without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

effects.label: Maneuver Master
effects.value: Once per Round when you perform a Maneuver, reduce its SP cost by 1.

effects.label: Adaptive Tactics
effects.value: Gain d8 Tactical Die at Initiative and end of turns. Spend for: Assault (+die to Attack) or Deflect (-die from Attack against you).

effects.label: Fighting Spirit
effects.value: Second Wind restores an additional 2 HP and 2 SP.

effects.label: Adaptive Tactics
effects.value: Your Tactical Die is d10.

effects.label: Adventuring Hero
effects.value: Ignore penalties from Forced March and being Encumbered.

effects.label: Hero's Resolve
effects.value: When you use Second Wind, gain a +5 bonus to Martial Attacks and Martial Checks until the end of your turn.

effects.label: Hero's Resolve
effects.value: Your Martial Attacks that score Heavy Hits ignore the target's Physical damage Resistances.

effects.label: Hero's Resolve
effects.value: While Bloodied, you gain 1 Temp HP at the start of each of your turns.

effects.label: Stalwart Protector
effects.value: You can use your Deflect Tactic against any Attack that targets a creature within your Melee Range.

effects.label: Stalwart Protector
effects.value: When you use a Defensive Maneuver as a Reaction to an Attack from a creature within 1 Space, the attacker must make a Physical Save against your Attack Check. Failure: The target is pushed 1 Space away or Taunted by you (your choice).

effects.label: Stalwart Protector
effects.value: Creatures Taunted by you deal 1 less damage to targets within 1 Space of you.

effects.label: Vigilant Watcher
effects.value: During a Long Rest with only Light Activity, gain ADV on the Might Save to avoid Exhaustion.

effects.label: Choose your Divine Damage type: Fire
effects.value: Your Divine Damage type is Fire.

effects.label: Choose your Divine Damage type: Cold
effects.value: Your Divine Damage type is Cold.

effects.label: Choose your Divine Damage type: Lightning
effects.value: Your Divine Damage type is Lightning.

effects.label: Choose your Divine Damage type: Acid
effects.value: Your Divine Damage type is Corrosion.

effects.label: Choose your Divine Damage type: Poison
effects.value: Your Divine Damage type is Poison.

effects.label: Choose your Divine Damage type: Radiant
effects.value: Your Divine Damage type is Radiant.

effects.label: Choose your Divine Damage type: Umbral
effects.value: Your Divine Damage type is Umbral.

effects.label: Choose your Divine Damage type: Psychic
effects.value: Your Divine Damage type is Psychic.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Magic
effects.value: When you learn a new Spell, you can choose any Spell with the chosen Spell Tag.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Life
effects.value: When you produce an MP Effect that restores HP to at least 1 creature, restore 1 HP to 1 creature within 1 Space.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Death
effects.value: Enemy creatures within 10 Spaces take +1 damage from Attacks while they're Well-Bloodied.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Grave
effects.value: Allied creatures within 10 Spaces take 1 less damage from Attacks while they're Well-Bloodied.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Light
effects.value: When you produce an MP Effect that targets at least 1 creature, force 1 target to make a Might or Charisma Save. Failure: target sheds a 1 Space Aura of Bright Light and is Hindered on its next Attack until end of next turn.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Dark
effects.value: Can Hide in Dim Light; remains Hidden until moving or area becomes Bright Light.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Order
effects.value: Once per turn, when a creature you can see within 10 Spaces makes a Check, spend 1 AP as a Reaction to remove all instances of ADV and DisADV from that Check.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Chaos
effects.value: Once per Long Rest, when you make a Spell Attack or Spell Check, give yourself ADV and roll on the Wild Magic Table. Regain when you roll Initiative.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Divination
effects.value: When you spend MP, you gain the ability to see Invisible creatures and objects until the start of your next turn.

effects.label: Choose 2 Divine Domains: Trickery
effects.value: When you produce an MP Effect that targets at least 1 creature, create an illusory duplicate of 1 target until the start of your next turn. The next Attack against that target has DisADV and removes the duplicate.

effects.label: Destruction
effects.value: 1 MP: Target takes 3 Divine damage if the Spell Check equals or exceeds AD; make a Spell Attack Check if the Spell normally has no Check.

effects.label: Guidance
effects.value: 1 MP: Target gains a d8 Help Die for 1 Check within 1 minute; that Check gains ADV when the die is used.

effects.label: Restoration
effects.value: 1 MP: Target regains 3 HP.

effects.label: Divine Damage Expansion
effects.value: When you deal damage with a Spell, you can convert it to your Divine Damage type. You also gain Resistance (1) to your Divine Damage type.

effects.label: Divine Omen (Flavor Feature)
effects.value: Once per Long Rest, spend 10 minutes communing with your Deity to ask one yes-or-no question.

effects.label: Divine Rebuke
effects.value: 2 AP: Censure chosen creatures within 5 Spaces that can see or hear you. Spell Attack vs AD for 1 Divine Damage; repeated Mental Save failure Intimidates for 1 minute or until damage.

effects.label: Lesser Divine Intervention
effects.value: 2 AP: Make a DC 15 Spell Check for an HP pool to distribute within 5 Spaces. Failure: pool 3 HP. Success: pool 3 HP and regain 1 MP. Success (5): pool +2 HP.

effects.label: Cleric Order
effects.value: Choose 1 additional Divine Domain.

effects.label: Divine Blessing
effects.value: Divine Blessing can spend additional MP: Destruction +2 damage per MP, Restoration +2 healing per MP.

effects.label: Channel Divinity
effects.value: Divine Rebuke +1 damage; Lesser Divine Intervention HP pool increases by 2.

effects.label: Divine Interrogator (Flavor Feature)
effects.value: Once per Long Rest, ask an interrogated creature a yes-or-no question. On failed Charisma Save, it can't lie to that question.

effects.label: Vanquish Heresy
effects.value: advantage

effects.label: Vanquish Heresy
effects.value: advantage

effects.label: Vanquish Heresy
effects.value: advantage

effects.label: Vanquish Heresy
effects.value: Creatures Intimidated by your Divine Rebuke don't stop being Intimidated when they take damage.

effects.label: Chastise
effects.value: 1 MP: Brand the target as a heretic for 1 minute; gain ADV on Insight and Intimidation Checks against it, and once per round on a hit you can deal +1 Divine Damage.

effects.label: All That Ails (Flavor Feature)
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Sanctification
effects.value: MP healing beyond a creature's HP maximum becomes Temp HP; MP healing on Death's Door restores additional HP equal to your Prime Modifier.

effects.label: Hand of Salvation
effects.value: Reaction, 2 AP: Pull a willing creature within 5 Spaces to an unoccupied Space within 1 Space of you when it would be Hit; the Attack misses and it is immune to all damage during the movement.

effects.label: Attack Command
effects.value: Command ally to Attack with ADV (1 AP + 1 SP, once per turn).

effects.label: Dodge Command
effects.value: Command ally to Full Dodge (1 AP + 1 SP, once per turn).

effects.label: Move Command
effects.value: Command ally to move up to Speed without opportunity attacks (1 AP + 1 SP, once per turn).

effects.label: Inspiring Presence
effects.value: Once per Round in combat when you spend SP: restore 1 HP to a creature within 10 Spaces that can see or hear you; Death's Door targets regain 1 additional HP.

effects.label: Stamina Regeneration
effects.value: Regain up to half max SP when granting Help Die (once per round).

effects.label: Natural Leader
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Natural Leader
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Bolster
effects.value: Help Action for attacks in aura (1 AP or Reaction).

effects.label: Rally
effects.value: Grant 1 Temp HP to creatures in aura (1 AP).

effects.label: Reinforce
effects.value: Impose DisADV on attacks in aura (Reaction).

effects.label: Commander's Call
effects.value: Commander's Call range 10 Spaces; spend 2 additional SP to issue 1 additional command.

effects.label: Inspiring Presence
effects.value: Inspiring Presence restores 1 additional HP.

effects.label: Commanding Aura
effects.value: Help Die starts at d10; Rally grants +1 temp HP per 2 SP; Reinforce can spend 1 SP to grant ADV on Saves made as part of the Attack.

effects.label: Gallant Hero
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Aura of Courage
effects.value: Allies in aura: Resistance to Frightened and Intimidated.

effects.label: Protective Orders
effects.value: Commander's Call targets gain Resistance (1) to next damage before your next turn.

effects.label: Restoring Rally
effects.value: Rally: Bloodied creatures regain HP instead of Temp HP.

effects.label: Battlefield Tactician
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Morale Breaker
effects.value: Commander's Call: Free Intimidate Action against creature within 10 Spaces (once per combat).

effects.label: Battlefield Tactics
effects.value: Allies in aura: +1 damage on first Melee Attack vs flanked creatures each turn.

effects.label: Priority Target
effects.value: Priority Target (1 AP + 1 SP): Choose creature within 10 Spaces. Until your next turn, allies in aura have ADV on first attack on their turns vs that creature.

effects.label: Domain Creation
effects.value: Create 8 Domain Spaces (1 AP + 1 MP). Cast spells from any Domain Space.

effects.label: Nature's Grasp
effects.value: Spend 1 AP to bind creature in Domain (Spell Check vs Repeated Physical Save).

effects.label: Move Creature
effects.value: Spend 1 AP to move bound creature up to 2 Spaces within Domain.

effects.label: Move Object
effects.value: Use Object Action from any Domain Space, move objects up to 5 Spaces.

effects.label: Wild Growth
effects.value: 1 AP + 1 MP: DC 10 Spell Check to heal 2+ HP, then 1 HP per turn in Domain.

effects.label: Transformation
effects.value: Transform: 1 AP + 1 MP (free once per Long Rest). Gain 3 Wild Form HP, natural weapons.

effects.label: Beast Traits
effects.value: 3 Trait Points for Beast/Wild Form traits. Spend extra MP for +2 Trait Points each.

effects.label: Form Switching
effects.value: Spend 1 AP to switch between True Form and Wild Forms.

effects.label: Nature's Torrent
effects.value: Reaction (1 AP): Create 3 Space Diameter Sphere for 1 minute. Creatures have Vulnerability (1) to triggering Elemental damage and DisADV on movement/Prone resistance saves.

effects.label: Druid Domain
effects.value: Druid Domain spaces increase to 10; vanish if you end your turn farther than 20 Spaces away; spend MP for +8 Spaces per MP; Wild Growth heals +1 HP per 2 MP.

effects.label: Wild Form
effects.value: Wild Form gains +1 HP and +1 Trait Point.

effects.label: Nature's Torrent
effects.value: Nature's Torrent range 15 Spaces; spend 2 MP for +1 Vulnerability or X MP for +X Area diameter.

effects.label: Fire Within
effects.value: Immune to cold weather. Boil 1 gallon liquid with 1 minute contact.

effects.label: Fiery Form
effects.value: Wild Forms: Elemental (Fire) type, Fire Resistance (1), Fire damage natural weapons.

effects.label: Cleansing Flames
effects.value: When healing in Domain: remove Impaired, Dazed, Burning, or Poisoned.

effects.label: Rolling Wild Fire
effects.value: Creatures take 1 Fire damage per Space moved in Domain or starting turn in Domain.

effects.label: Plant Form
effects.value: Wild Forms: Plant type, immune to Bleeding, Poison damage natural weapons.

effects.label: Vineguard
effects.value: Creatures of choice in Domain gain benefits of 1/2 Cover.

effects.label: Thorny Grasp
effects.value: Creatures who fail Nature's Grasp save begin Bleeding.

effects.label: Seed Vault
effects.value: Produce seeds of any mundane plant you've touched.

selections.prompt: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Aberration
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Aberration. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Aberrations recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Beast
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Beast. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Beasts recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Celestial
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Celestial. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Celestials recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Construct
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Construct. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Constructs recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Dragon
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Dragon. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Dragons recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Elemental
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Elemental. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Elementals recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Fey
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Fey. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Fey recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Fiend
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Fiend. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Fiends recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Giant
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Giant. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Giants recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Humanoid
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Humanoid. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Humanoids recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Monstrosity
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Monstrosity. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Monstrosities recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Ooze
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Ooze. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Oozes recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Plant
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Plant. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Plants recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose a Creature Type for your starting entries: Undead
effects.value: Bestiary starting entry: Undead. You have ADV on Checks to learn or recall information about Undead recorded in your Bestiary.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Grassland
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Grassland
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Grassland
effects.value: In grassland: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Forest
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Forest
effects.value: In forest: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Desert
effects.value: half

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Desert
effects.value: In desert: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised, resistance to hot temperature Exhaustion.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Mountain
effects.value: equal_to_speed

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Mountain
effects.value: half

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Mountain
effects.value: In mountains: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised, resistance to altitude Exhaustion.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Jungle
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Jungle
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Jungle
effects.value: In jungle: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised, ignore Difficult Terrain, Poisoned resistance, ADV vs diseases.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Swamp
effects.value: half

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Swamp
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Swamp
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Swamp
effects.value: In swamp: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised, Poison resistance, Poisoned resistance, ADV vs diseases.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Coast
effects.value: equal_to_speed

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Coast
effects.value: In coastal areas: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised, no underwater weapon penalties, double breath holding, ADV on Awareness underwater.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Tundra
effects.value: half

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Tundra
effects.value: In tundra: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised, resistance to cold temperature Exhaustion.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Subterranean
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Subterranean
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Subterranean
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Subterranean
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Subterranean
effects.value: Underground: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised. Conditional bonuses for existing senses handled separately.

effects.label: Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Urban
Choose 2 types of Favored Terrain: Urban
effects.value: In urban areas: ADV on Stealth and Survival, cannot be Surprised.

effects.label: Hunter's Mark
effects.value: Mark a creature (1 AP + 1 SP): ADV on Awareness/Survival to find, first Martial Attack has ADV and ignores PDR, Heavy/Critical Hits grant d8 Help Die.

effects.label: Hunter's Strike
effects.value: Spend 1 SP on a Weapon Attack to add: Acid (1 Corrosion, Agility Save for Hindered), Fire (1 Fire, Might Save for Burning), Piercing (1 Piercing, Might Save for Bleeding), Snare (1 Bludgeoning, Agility Save for Immobilized), or Toxin (1 Poison, Might Save for Impaired). +1 damage per additional SP.

effects.label: Hunter's Mark
effects.value: Hunter's Mark Help Die is d10; first Martial Attack ignores Physical Resistance.

effects.label: Favored Terrain
effects.value: Choose 1 additional Favored Terrain.

effects.label: Hunter's Strike
effects.value: Use up to 2 Hunter's Strike Enhancements on an Attack.

effects.label: Monster Hunter
effects.value: After recording 3 creatures of the same type, gain a Bestiary entry for the entire type.

effects.label: Choose 3 Concoction Recipes: Hydra's Blood
effects.value: Regain 1 HP on Heavy Hits vs Marked target. Gain Poisoned Resistance. Melee attackers take 1 Poison damage.

effects.label: Choose 3 Concoction Recipes: Basilisk Eye
effects.value: Gain Tremorsense 20 for Marked target. Gain Physical Resistance (1).

effects.label: Choose 3 Concoction Recipes: Ooze Gel
effects.value: Heavy Hits vs Marked target cause Hindered. Gain amorphous body properties.

effects.label: Choose 3 Concoction Recipes: Aberrant Tumor
effects.value: ADV on Analyze Creature and Mental Saves vs Marked target. Gain Psychic Resistance (1).

effects.label: Choose 3 Concoction Recipes: Deathweed
effects.value: Heavy Hits vs Marked target bypass Physical Resistances and stop healing. Gain death-related resistances.

effects.label: Choose 3 Concoction Recipes: Plant Fibers
effects.value: Failed saves vs you stop Marked target's movement. Gain Bleeding immunity and 1 Temp HP per turn.

effects.label: Choose 3 Concoction Recipes: Divine Water
effects.value: Heavy Hits vs Marked target cause Exposed. Gain Radiant Resistance (Half) and emit light.

effects.label: Discerning Eye
effects.value: Gain ADV on checks to find and disarm traps.

effects.label: Dynamic Traps
effects.value: Create and Set traps (max = Prime Modifier). Can spend 1 SP to add a Hunter's Strike effect to a trap upon setting it.

effects.label: Meditation
effects.value: During a Short Rest or longer, temporarily increase the Mastery level of a chosen Charisma or Intelligence skill by 1 up to its cap. You stay alert while meditating.

effects.label: Choose 2 Monk Stances: Bear Stance
effects.value: Active stance: +1 damage on Heavy Hits or higher and Critical Hits with Unarmed Strikes or Melee Weapons; once per turn, after missing a Melee Martial Attack, gain ADV on the next Melee Martial Attack before end of turn.

effects.label: Choose 2 Monk Stances: Bull Stance
effects.value: Active stance: Successful Physical Checks to push also deal 1 Bludgeoning damage; pushed targets move 1 additional Space, and you can move in a straight line with the target without Opportunity Attacks or spending movement.

effects.label: Choose 2 Monk Stances: Cobra Stance
effects.value: Active stance: +1 damage with Unarmed Strike or Melee Weapon Martial Attacks against creatures that damaged you since the start of your last turn; when a creature in Melee Range misses you with a Melee Attack, spend 1 AP as a Reaction to make a Melee Martial Attack against it.

effects.label: Choose 2 Monk Stances: Gazelle Stance
effects.value: Active stance: Speed and Jump Distance +1, ignore Difficult Terrain, and gain ADV on Acrobatics Checks and Agility Saves.

effects.label: Choose 2 Monk Stances: Mantis Stance
effects.value: Active stance: ADV on Checks and Saves to initiate, maintain, or escape Grapples; when you start your turn with at least 1 creature Grappled, gain +1 AP for a Grapple Maneuver against a creature you have Grappled.

effects.label: Choose 2 Monk Stances: Mongoose Stance
effects.value: Active stance: Melee Martial Attacks deal +1 damage while Flanked; when making a Melee Martial Attack, choose a second target within Melee Range and make one Attack Check against both targets.

effects.label: Choose 2 Monk Stances: Scorpion Stance
effects.value: Active stance: Creatures provoke Opportunity Attacks when entering your Melee Range. On Melee Martial Attack, spend 1 AP for +1 damage and a Physical Save; failure Impairs the target on its next Physical Check before end of your next turn.

effects.label: Choose 2 Monk Stances: Turtle Stance
effects.value: Active stance: Speed becomes 1 unless already lower; gain PDR, EDR, and MDR; gain ADV on Might Saves and Saves against being moved or knocked Prone.

effects.label: Choose 2 Monk Stances: Wolf Stance
effects.value: Active stance: After attacking with an Unarmed Strike or Melee Weapon, immediately move up to 1 Space without spending movement; gain ADV on Opportunity Attacks, and creatures have DisADV on Opportunity Attacks against you.

effects.label: Iron Palm
effects.value: Limbs are Natural Weapons (2 Bludgeoning damage, chosen Weapon Style Enhancement).

effects.label: Step of the Wind
effects.value: Move along vertical surfaces or across liquids up to your Speed without falling during the movement.

effects.label: Step of the Wind
effects.value: Use your Prime Modifier instead of Agility for Jump Distance and Falling damage.

effects.label: Source of Power
effects.value: Monks harness inner Ki through training, mentorship, or deep meditation, perfecting both mind and body.

effects.label: Ki Points
effects.value: Ki maximum equals Stamina Points. When you spend a Stamina Point on your turn, regain 1 Ki Point. Regain all spent Ki Points when Combat ends.

effects.label: Ki Actions
effects.value: When a creature misses you with a Ranged Martial Attack targeting PD, spend 1+ Ki. Redirect at a creature within 5 Spaces (Attack Check vs PD). Hit: deal Ki spent as damage (same type as triggering Attack).

effects.label: Ki Actions
effects.value: Spend 1+ Ki when taking fall damage. Reduce damage by Ki spent.

effects.label: Ki Actions
effects.value: When a creature makes an Attack against you, spend 1 Ki Point to impose DisADV on the attack.

effects.label: Monk Training
effects.value: Iron Palm gains an additional Melee Weapon Style and Unarmed Strike can use both Weapon Enhancements.

effects.label: Monk Stances
effects.value: Choose 1 additional Monk Stance.

effects.label: Spiritual Balance
effects.value: Ki Point maximum +1; whenever you regain Ki, regain half your maximum Ki.

effects.label: Astral Arms
effects.value: Astral arms usable only for Unarmed Strikes with Reach; deal Astral damage and can target PD or AD (choose per attack).

effects.label: Astral Deflection
effects.value: When Deflecting, you can redirect projectiles that missed any target within 2 spaces of you.

effects.label: Astral Watch
effects.value: While Unconscious, your astral self remains aware and can converse. During sleep, you may awaken instantly.

effects.label: Ebb
effects.value: Gain 2 spaces of movement when you enter a new Monk Stance.

effects.label: Flow
effects.value: If Uncanny Dodge is used against a melee attack, spend 1 AP to make an Opportunity Attack against the attacker, provided they're within range.

effects.label: Changing Tides
effects.value: Deflect Attack works on Melee Martial Attacks from Large or smaller creatures; redirect to a different target within 1 space.

effects.label: Fluid Movement
effects.value: Move through spaces as though you were one size smaller.

effects.label: Cypher Speech
effects.value: Become fluent in a Mortal language and craft hidden messages for a demographic of your choice, embedding simple directives in speech or writing.

effects.label: Debilitating Strike
effects.value: When making a Weapon Attack, spend 1 SP to force a Physical Save. Failure: target suffers Deafened, Exposed, Hindered, or Slowed 2 for 1 Round; same option cannot affect a target more than once at a time.

effects.label: Cunning Action
effects.value: Gain movement equal to half Speed when taking Disengage, Feint, or Hide; movement occurs immediately before or after the action.

effects.label: Source of Power
effects.value: Rogues exploit weakness through nimbleness and cunning, whether learned as thieves, nobles, or assassins.

effects.label: Cheap Shot
effects.value: +1 damage on Martial Attacks against creatures that are Flanked or Prone, have any Condition other than Invisible, or are targets you are Hidden from.

effects.label: Debilitating Strike
effects.value: Spend SP to choose 1 additional Debilitating Strike condition per SP.

effects.label: Cheap Shot
effects.value: Cheap Shot deals +2 damage instead.

effects.label: Hundred Ways to Die
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Thousand Cuts
effects.value: On failed Debilitating Strike saves, inflict Bleeding; DC to end equals your Save DC and regaining HP cannot end it.

effects.label: Flourishes
effects.value: Cunning Action now includes Disarm and Dodge, providing the same free movement before or after the action.

effects.label: Taunting Shot
effects.value: Once per round when an Attack targets a creature that fulfills the criteria for Cheap Shot, forego Cheap Shot damage to force a Charisma Save. Failure: the creature is Taunted until the end of your next turn.

effects.label: Riposte
effects.value: When a creature within your melee range misses you with an attack, it provokes an Opportunity Attack from you.

effects.label: Tall Tales
effects.value: Spin captivating stories for up to five minutes to distract non-hostile crowds, giving them DisADV on Awareness Checks while enthralled.

effects.label: Focus Property
effects.value: Gain a 1 point Focus Property (changeable on Long Rest).

effects.label: Choose a Sorcerous Origin: Intuitive Magic
Choose a Sorcerous Origin: Resilient Magic
Choose a Sorcerous Origin: Unstable Magic
effects.value: When you Critically Succeed or Fail on a Spell Check, roll on the Wild Magic Table.

effects.label: Overload Strain
effects.value: Must save vs Exhaustion when using Overload Magic and at the start of each turn.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spell Enhancements: Careful Spell
effects.value: 1 MP: When casting an area Spell, exclude creatures of your choice from the Spell's damage and effects.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spell Enhancements: Distant Spell
effects.value: 1 MP: Increase a Spell's range by 2 Spaces if 1 Space, or 10 Spaces if greater.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spell Enhancements: Quickened Spell
effects.value: 1 MP: Reduce the AP cost of a Spell by 1, minimum 1 AP.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spell Enhancements: Subtle Spell
effects.value: 1 MP: Cast the Spell without requiring Somatic or Verbal Components.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spell Enhancements: Transmuted Spell
effects.value: 1 MP: Change a Spell's damage type to any other damage type except True damage.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spell Enhancements: Vicious Spell
effects.value: 1 MP: When casting a Spell that forces a Save, 1 target has DisADV on its first Save against the Spell.

effects.label: Innate Power
effects.value: Gain an additional 1-point Focus Property choice; change either or both chosen properties on a Long Rest.

effects.label: Overload Magic
effects.value: No Attribute Save when you use Overload; still save at the start of each turn while Overloaded.

effects.label: Meta Magic
effects.value: Learn 1 additional Meta Magic option and use 2 different Meta Magic Spell Enhancements at a time.

effects.label: Celestial Appearance (Flavor Feature)
effects.value: Gain angelic features. If already fluent in Celestial, gain 1 Language Mastery.

effects.label: Celestial Origin
effects.value: Gain 2 Ancestry Points for Angelborn Traits.

effects.label: Celestial Protection
effects.value: Learn Careful Spell. It costs 0 MP.

effects.label: Celestial Overload
effects.value: Spend 1 AP while overloaded for AoE heal/damage.

effects.label: Draconic Appearance (Flavor Feature)
effects.value: Gain draconic features and 1 level of Language Mastery in Draconic (or another language if already fluent).

effects.label: Draconic Origin
effects.value: Gain 2 Ancestry Points for Dragonborn Traits & choose a Draconic Origin.

effects.label: Draconic Transmutation
effects.value: Gain Transmuted Spell. Cost is 0 MP if changing to Draconic Origin damage type.

effects.label: Smite
effects.value: Spend 1+ SP on a Martial Attack with bound weapon: +1 Bound Damage per SP, and gain 1 Martial Enhancement free.

effects.label: Somatic Weapon
effects.value: Use your Bound Weapon to perform Somatic Components of Spells.

effects.label: Illuminate
effects.value: Produce, extinguish, or adjust bright/dim light in a 5-space radius from the bonded weapon for free.

effects.label: Recall
effects.value: When the bonded weapon is within 20 spaces and unsecured, call it to your hand for free; if you lack a free hand, it lands at your feet.

effects.label: Sense Magic
effects.value: Focus for 1 minute to detect certain creature types within 20 spaces; Spell Checks reveal their nature and location until the end of your next turn.

effects.label: Source of Power
effects.value: Spellblades wield magic drawn from patrons, oaths, bloodlines, personal study, artistic expression, or mysterious relics.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spellblade Disciplines: Acolyte
effects.value: Spend 1 AP and 1 MP to heal or cure: Heal – DC 10 Spell Check restores up to 3 HP (2 HP on failure, +1 HP per 5 over). Cure – Spell Check vs disease/poison DC to end it on a creature within 1 space.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spellblade Disciplines: Hex Warrior
effects.value: Spend 1 AP and 1 MP to curse a creature within 10 spaces for 1 minute; Spell Check vs Repeated Physical Save. Failure: target is Dazed or Impaired (your choice), takes 1 Umbral damage each turn, and cannot regain HP.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spellblade Disciplines: Spell Breaker
effects.value: Initiate a Spell Duel as the Challenger without spending MP using a weapon you wield if the caster or a target is within weapon range or you are between them. Make a Martial Check instead of a Spell Check. Spend SP for +1 bonus per SP and MP as normal for +2 bonus per MP. You have ADV if within 1 Space of the caster.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spellblade Disciplines: Spell Warder
effects.value: When you deal Elemental or Mystical damage with an Attack, gain Resistance (1) to that damage type for 1 Round; replace or maintain the resistance on subsequent triggers.

effects.label: Choose 2 Spellblade Disciplines: Blink Blade
effects.value: Once per turn, immediately before or after making an attack, teleport to a space you can see within 1 space of your original position.

effects.label: Spellstrike
effects.value: Once per turn when making a Martial Attack, cast a Spell as part of the same Action for 1 AP less. The Spell must target 1 creature targeted by the Attack, cannot exceed the Spell range, uses the Attack Check if it requires a Check, and uses your Save DC for Saves. The combined attack can benefit from Martial and Spell Enhancements and does not require Somatic Components.

effects.label: Bound Weapon
effects.value: Bound Damage ignores Resistance to its damage type.

effects.label: Spellblade Discipline
effects.value: Choose 1 additional Discipline; Acolyte +2 healing per MP, Hex Warrior +1 damage per MP, Spell Warder can spend 1 MP for Resistance Half.

effects.label: Spellstrike
effects.value: Spellstrike Spell can target multiple creatures or an Area when at least 1 Spell target is also a Martial Attack target.

effects.label: Aura of Protection
effects.value: Allies you choose within 2 spaces gain ADV on Mental Saves.

effects.label: Divine Strike
effects.value: When you deal damage with Spellstrike, you may convert the spell’s damage to Radiant or Umbral (chosen when you gain this feature).

effects.label: Lay on Hands
effects.value: Add the Acolyte Spellblade Discipline to your known disciplines (or another if already known). Once per Long Rest, use the Acolyte Discipline without MP and gain +5 to the Spell Check.

effects.label: Oathsworn
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Rune Expert
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Rune Names
effects.value: Common rune names include: Earth (Uruz/Terra), Flame (Ild/Ignis), Frost (Isaz/Frigus), Lightning (Thurisaz/Fulmen), Water (Laquz/Aqua), Wind (Ansuz/Ventus).

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Earth Rune
effects.value: When you Smite with the rune-inscribed weapon, create Difficult Terrain in a 1-space radius sphere centered on the target.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Earth Rune
effects.value: Gain ADV on checks and saves against being knocked prone or moved against your will.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Flame Rune
effects.value: When you Smite a creature, it must make a Physical Save or begin Burning.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Flame Rune
effects.value: If you fought since inscribing this rune, regain 2 Rest Points when you finish a Short Rest.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Frost Rune
effects.value: When you Smite a creature, it must make a Physical Save or be Immobilized for 1 Round.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Frost Rune
effects.value: When you roll Initiative, gain 2 Temp HP.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Lightning Rune
effects.value: When you Smite a creature, it must make a Physical Save or become Stunned 1 until the end of your next turn.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Lightning Rune
Choose 2 Runes to learn: Water Rune
effects.value: When you Smite a creature, it must make a Physical Save or be knocked Prone.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Water Rune
effects.value: When an MP effect restores your HP, regain 1 additional HP.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Wind Rune
effects.value: When you Smite a creature, it must make a Physical Save or be pushed 1 space in a direction you choose.

effects.label: Choose 2 Runes to learn: Wind Rune
Beseech Patron
effects.value: Beseech your Patron for aid when in need. The Patron may answer, demand something in return, or decline at GM discretion.

effects.label: Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Weapon
effects.value: Considered to have Training with your Pact Weapon.

effects.label: Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Weapon
Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Weapon
effects.value: Benefit from your Pact Weapon's Style Passive.

effects.label: Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Weapon
effects.value: Dismiss to and summon from a pocket dimension as a Minor Action.

effects.label: Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Armor
effects.value: Considered to have Training with your Pact Armor.

effects.label: Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Armor
Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Armor
Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Armor
effects.value: Dismiss to and summon from a pocket dimension as a Minor Action.

effects.label: Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Spell
effects.value: Death's Toll: +1 damage to Bloodied targets. Range Increase: +1 (if 1 Space) or +5 (if greater). Patron's Favor: Once per Round, ADV on your Pact Spell's Check.

effects.label: Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Familiar
Choose your Pact Boon: Pact Familiar
effects.value: Your familiar gains 3 additional Familiar Traits for free.

effects.label: Hasty Bargain
effects.value: Once per turn: spend 1 HP to gain ADV on a Check.

effects.label: Desperate Bargain
effects.value: Once per Combat: spend 1 AP to regain HP equal to your Prime Modifier, but become Exposed.

effects.label: Life Tap
effects.value: Once per Long Rest, you can spend HP instead of MP for spell effects (regain on initiative).

effects.label: Pact Boon
effects.value: Chosen Pact Boon improves: Weapon/Armor gain a 1-point property and MP conversion, Pact Spell gains 2 any-source Spells and another Pact Spell, or Pact Familiar gains 3 Trait Points and no Negative Traits.

effects.label: Life Tap
effects.value: Life Tap grants ADV on the Check to produce the effect.

effects.label: Alien Comprehension (Flavor Feature)
effects.value: Become fluent in Deep Speech and understand mad writings.

effects.label: Forbidden Knowledge
effects.value: Temporarily learn any spell after a rest with a 2 MP cost reduction.

effects.label: Eldritch Bargain
effects.value: Spend 1 HP to target a creature's other defense (PD or AD) with an attack.

effects.label: Dream Walker
effects.value: ADV

effects.label: Fey Step
effects.value: Reaction teleport when hit, becoming invisible.

effects.label: Beguiling Bargain
effects.value: Spend 1 HP on spell/attack to force a save against your Fey Aspect Condition.

effects.label: Choose your Fey Aspect Condition: Charmed
effects.value: Your Fey Aspect Condition is Charmed.

effects.label: Choose your Fey Aspect Condition: Intimidated
effects.value: Your Fey Aspect Condition is Intimidated.

effects.label: Arcane Sigil
effects.value: Create Arcane Sigil (1 AP + 1 MP): 1 Space area, choose School/Tag, creatures within have ADV on Spell Checks for that type. Can teleport sigil 1 AP within 10 spaces.

effects.label: Ritual Caster
effects.value: Learn 1 Ritual Spell per Wizard level. Can study and learn Ritual Spells from external sources (hours = MP cost).

effects.label: Choose your specialized Spell School: Astromancy
Choose your specialized Spell School: Astromancy
effects.value: Reduce MP cost by 1 for Astromancy spells (once per Long Rest, regain on Initiative).

effects.label: Choose your specialized Spell School: Conjuration
Choose your specialized Spell School: Conjuration
effects.value: Reduce MP cost by 1 for Conjuration spells (once per Long Rest, regain on Initiative).

effects.label: Choose your specialized Spell School: Divination
Choose your specialized Spell School: Divination
effects.value: Reduce MP cost by 1 for Divination spells (once per Long Rest, regain on Initiative).

effects.label: Choose your specialized Spell School: Elemental
Choose your specialized Spell School: Elemental
effects.value: Reduce MP cost by 1 for Elemental spells (once per Long Rest, regain on Initiative).

effects.label: Choose your specialized Spell School: Enchantment
Choose your specialized Spell School: Enchantment
effects.value: Reduce MP cost by 1 for Enchantment spells (once per Long Rest, regain on Initiative).

effects.label: Choose your specialized Spell School: Invocation
Choose your specialized Spell School: Invocation
effects.value: Reduce MP cost by 1 for Invocation spells (once per Long Rest, regain on Initiative).

effects.label: Choose your specialized Spell School: Nullification
Choose your specialized Spell School: Nullification
effects.value: Reduce MP cost by 1 for Nullification spells (once per Long Rest, regain on Initiative).

effects.label: Choose your specialized Spell School: Transmutation
Choose your specialized Spell School: Transmutation
effects.value: Reduce MP cost by 1 for Transmutation spells (once per Long Rest, regain on Initiative).

effects.label: Prepared Spell
effects.value: Choose 1 Prepared Spell per Long Rest: Mana Limit Break (+1 to Spend Limit once per Long Rest, regain on Initiative) and Rehearsed Casting (opponents have DisADV in Spell Duels).

effects.label: Spell School Initiate
effects.value: Signature School reduces MP cost by an additional 1.

effects.label: Arcane Sigil
effects.value: Spell Tag adds 1 additional School or Tag per MP; Area increases diameter by 1 Space per MP.

effects.label: Prepared Spell
effects.value: Choose 1 additional known Spell after a Long Rest; both are Prepared Spells, but only one Mana Limit Break.

effects.label: Portal Magic
effects.value: Enhances Arcane Sigil to create a linked teleportation portal.

effects.label: Portal Magic
effects.value: When you learn a new Spell, you can choose any Spell with the Teleportation Spell Tag.

effects.label: Portal Sage
effects.value: ADV on checks related to Astromancy. Can analyze portals.

effects.label: Coven's Gift
effects.value: Curse spells count as part of your chosen Spell School.

effects.label: Curse Expert
effects.value: Can detect and analyze curses.

selections.prompt: When casting a spell, you may add one of the following Hexes

effects.label: When casting a spell, you may add one of the following Hexes: Bewitching Hex
effects.value: 1 MP: Target becomes Charmed.

effects.label: When casting a spell, you may add one of the following Hexes: Reaping/Life Hex
effects.value: 1 MP: Target takes 1 True damage and you regain 1 HP each turn.

effects.label: When casting a spell, you may add one of the following Hexes: Vermin Hex
effects.value: 1 MP: Target is silenced and shrinks over time.
